post.summary: Sets the part number and description for a standard content component.

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The id of the company that owns the metadata to be modified.

get.summary: Gets all possible values for each of the standard content parameters.

parameters.name: standard
parameters.description: If provided, list only standard content corresponding to this standard.

category.description: Category for the corresponding standard content.

class.description: Class for the corresponding standard content.

component.description: Component for the corresponding standard content.

id.description: Document ID for the corresponding standard content.

standard.description: Standard for the corresponding standard content.

BTStandardContentHierarchyItem.description: Describes a single instance of standard content.

customParameters.description: Non-driving custom parameters whose values are to be set.

parameters.description: Parameters that drive configuration. Used to specify the standard content component to which the custom parameter values are associated.

BTStandardContentSetCustomParameterSpeci.description: Specifies a standard content component along with the custom properties whose values are to be set.

errorMessage.description: If there was an error, this provides a more detailed description of the problem.

BTStandardContentSetCustomParametersResp.description: Reports the status of an individual request to set custom parameter values.

BTStandardContentPropertyIdAndValue.description: Non-driving custom parameters whose values are to be set.

BTStandardContentParameterIdAndValue.description: Parameters that drive configuration. Used to specify the standard content component to which the custom parameter values are associated.

BTStandardContentSetCustomParametersErro.description: Indicates whether or not the individual request had an error.

scopes.OAuth2ReadPII: Application can read your profile information
scopes.OAuth2Write: Application can write to your documents
scopes.OAuth2Delete: Application can delete your documents and workspaces
scopes.OAuth2Purchase: Application can request purchases on your behalf
scopes.OAuth2Share: Application can share and unshare documents on your behalf
scopes.document.create: Atlas Application can create a document
scopes.document.edit: Atlas Application can edit a document
scopes.document.delete: Atlas Application can delete a document
scopes.document.read: Atlas Application can read a document
scopes.enterprise.create: Atlas Application can create an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.read: Atlas Application can read from an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.edit: Atlas Application can edit an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.delete: Atlas Application can delete an enterprise
scopes.enterprise.member.create: Atlas Application can create an enterprise member
scopes.enterprise.member.read: Atlas Application can read the details of an enterprise member
scopes.enterprise.member.edit: Atlas Application can edit the details of an enterprise member
scopes.enterprise.member.delete: Atlas Application can delete a member from an enterprise
scopes.webhook.create: Atlas Application can create a webhook on behalf of the logged-in user
scopes.webhook.edit: Atlas Application can edit a webhook on behalf of the logged-in user
scopes.webhook.read: Atlas Application can read a webhook on behalf of the logged-in user
scopes.webhook.delete: Atlas Application can delete a webhook on behalf of the logged-in user
scopes.PLMIntegration: PLM automation can invoke limited operations

BasicAuth.description: Use Basic Authentication with API Keys (key as username and secret as password) to authenticate requests.
